description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the php:8.1 Docker image with mysql and postgres services, and a before_script that runs apt update, installs git libpq-dev libzip-dev zip, installs PHP extensions pdo_mysql pdo_pgsql zip, downloads the Composer installer, and executes php composer.phar install, caching the vendor/ directory. Define variables MYSQL_DATABASE, MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD, POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, and POSTGRES_USER for the database services. In the default test stage add a test:mysql job that runs vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit_mysql.xml --coverage-text. Add a test:pgsql job that runs vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit_pgsql.xml --coverage-text, and also add test:php7.4:mysql and test:php7.4:pgsql jobs that use the php:7.4 image and run the same respective phpunit commands. Finally, add test:php8.0:mysql and test:php8.0:pgsql jobs that use the php:8.0 image and run the corresponding phpunit commands.
